title: 5 Accessing Cash Services
body_text:
5	Accessing Cash Services
5.1	Overview of Accessing Cash Services
Access to the Cash Services application is granted through password login via Central 1âs Client Centre. You must be set up as a CPS Admin Security Officer or as a Client Centre User with access to Cash Services. See the User Management Part or the CPS Admin Application Part for procedures on creating Security Officers, Client Centre Users, and granting access to Cash Services.
Note:	Currently, there are two user management applications running parallel: CPS Admin and User Management. Eventually, User Management will replace CPS Admin. CPS Admin Security Officers are encouraged to use the User Management application.
5.2	Accessing Cash Services via the Client Centre
To log in to Cash Services:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	Youâll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itâs your first login to the Client Centre, youâve deleted your cookies, or youâre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
Cash Services
. See Figure 3.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youâve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under âMy Favouritesâ.
Figure 3: Accessing Cash Services
When the Cash Services login page opens, enter your Cash Services username (a 10-digit number) and password, then select
Login
. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Cash Services Login Page
At initial login and every 60 days, users are prompted to change their passwords. The password must be 8 to 20 characters and it must contain:
at least one capital letter,
one number, and
one of the following characters: @, #, $, %.
If the password format is incorrect, youâll get an error message. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Error Message for Incorrect Password Format
Caution
:	Always log off and close your browser when you step away from your desk and when you are finished using Cash Services.
END
